understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, within the available step budget, until the engine reports WIN for the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action consumed one step. MOVE actions would move the currently selected piece one tile in the chosen direction unless blocked. CLICK attempted to move/place the currently selected piece onto the clicked coordinate; the move had no effect if the destination/path was blocked by walls/obstacles or other blocking geometry, and clicking a selectable piece would switch/choose which piece was active (when multiple selectables existed).

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, within the available step budget, until the engine reports WIN for the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action consumed one step. MOVE actions would move the currently selected piece one tile in the chosen direction unless blocked. CLICK attempted to move/place the currently selected piece onto the clicked coordinate; the move had no effect if the destination/path was blocked by walls/obstacles or other blocking geometry, and clicking a selectable piece would switch/choose which piece was active (when multiple selectables existed).
